race.comment: LOVE KAYE (10) caught the eye first-up when rattling home to just miss at Balaklava. Is sure to have come on from that and is drawn much kinder this time. Expecting her to relish the rise to 1400m. TOOK GARDNER (8) has been good in his first two starts when finishing second. The form around him has been holding up and he should be at his top now. PAGANINI (3) is proving frustrating but has peaks that measure up. Not dismissing completely. BAY ROAD BOY (6) is a Grunt gelding on debut for the Jolly & Potter camp. Has trialled well in readiness and gets a key booking in Holder. No shock to see him make his presence felt.
race.rail_position: +12m from 900m to WP, +12m from WP to 1800m, +9 metres Remainder. (Pent: 6.40)
